summary: iter254 testing complete. 17/17 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: PurchasingApprovals standalone module correctly DELETED from main sidebar; Approval Hierarchy now embedded as tab inside PurchRec module with 3 tabs (Pending My Approval, My Requests, Onboarding Controls). Echo Schedule v2 API fully functional with 8 departments, 50+ positions, 19 seeded employees, tier management, job descriptions, reviews, shift compliance flags (MINOR_LATE_NIGHT), and MyEcho privacy-filtered endpoint. Regression tests pass for vendor-skus lookup (butter→Plugra), approvals limits (14 roles), and invoices (3 William invoices).
critical_code_review_comments: Echo Schedule v2 correctly implements 8 departments (boh-culinary, boh-stewarding, foh-restaurant, foh-banquets, foh-pool-rooftop, spa, engineering, housekeeping) with 50+ positions
Employee tier system (1/2/3) with manager-only labels correctly implemented - tier 3 labeled as 'Developing' not negative
Minor labor law compliance flags working: MINOR_LATE_NIGHT triggered for Jordan Lee (is_minor=true) with 15:00-23:00 shift
MyEcho endpoint correctly filters out employee_tier and compliance_flags for staff privacy
PurchasingApprovals module correctly consolidated into PurchRec as 'Approval Hierarchy' tab under INVOICE MANAGEMENT group
ApprovalHierarchyPanel has proper data-testid attributes: purchasing-approvals-panel, tab-pending, tab-mine, tab-controls
Vendor SKU lookup regression passes - butter→Plugra with fuzzy token-overlap scoring
Approval banner still renders with pending requests showing Carlos Mendes $35,000 Combi-oven replacement
test_credentials: Admin: admin@luccca.com / LuccaaAdmin2026! ; devAuth=1 query param for bypass
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 19 employees across 8 departments at startup via seed_echo_schedule(). Sample employees: Carlos Mendes (boh-culinary tier1), Jordan Lee (boh-culinary tier3 minor), Diego Morales (foh-banquets tier1). Also seeds 5 days of shifts with compliance flag checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter254 fully tested: (1) Echo Schedule v2 API at /api/echo-schedule/* with positions, employees, shifts, checker, myecho endpoints. (2) GET /positions returns 8 departments + 50+ positions + tier labels. (3) GET /employees returns 19 seeded employees with tier/is_minor/job_description/reviews. (4) PUT /employees/{eid}/tier and /job-description work correctly. (5) POST /employees/{eid}/reviews appends to reviews array. (6) POST /shifts creates shift with compliance_flags (MINOR_LATE_NIGHT for minors working past 9pm). (7) GET /shifts/checker returns total_shifts, compliance_violations, by_department, tier_breakdown. (8) GET /myecho/{eid} returns shifts WITHOUT employee_tier or compliance_flags (privacy). (9) PurchasingApprovals standalone module DELETED - now embedded in PurchRec as 'Approval Hierarchy' tab. (10) ApprovalHierarchyPanel has 3 tabs: Pending My Approval, My Requests, Onboarding Controls. (11) Regression: vendor-skus lookup, approvals limits, invoices all working.

frontend_sidebar.purchasing_approvals_standalone_deleted: PASS - No standalone module in sidebar

mocked_apis.note: Twilio SMS, Resend Email, Firebase Push are MOCKED - notification_outbox stores deliveries in MongoDB without actually sending. Claude Sonnet calls use real Emergent LLM key.
